keywords: BOLA ORDER 1 cart buyerTenantId ALS SETNX cart lock checkout_lock_ttl_ms OCC inventory reservation concurrent checkout oversell CF-16-1
ironRules: BOLA check at ORDER 1: cart.buyerTenantId === ALS.tenantId — before any lock or write
SETNX cart lock at ORDER 2 with TTL from FREEDOM config 'checkout_lock_ttl_ms'
OCC inventory reservation at ORDER 3-4 after lock acquired
tenantId from ALS ONLY — never from request payload
